                Twisted Achievements

                Twisted Minds History

                Founded in Saudi Arabia, Twisted Minds built its identity through aggressive expansion, high-level roster building, and a focus on international competition.

                Its structure grew year after year with stronger coaching, broader scouting, and rosters capable of competing in PUBG, Rocket League, Warzone, and more.

                The organization now represents one of the most ambitious and successful esports projects in MENA, with consistent international relevance.
